form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (19.90) at this track over 352m. Going well and can bounce back to winning form.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Free For All on April 1 over 352m at this track behind Cake Is Great beaten 6 lengths (20.01). Key chance on best form.

formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th in a Free For All on April 1 over 352m at this track behind Cake Is Great beaten 6 lengths (20.01). Key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd over 300m at Q Straight beaten one length (16.74) behind Scotch And Bye in a Grade 5 on March 30. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (19.83) in a Free For All, finishing a 3.5 lengths second. Has six successes and six minors from 22 starts from box 4. Looking to others.

formComments.comment: In the money last time at this track (19.83) in a Free For All, finishing a 3.5 lengths second. Has six successes and six minors from 22 starts from box 4. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 2.75 lengths in 19.95, beating Goldstar Herb. Last start finished 6th on April 1 over 352m at this track behind Cake Is Great beaten 8 lengths (20.21) in a Free For All. Tested under these conditions.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 3.5 lengths over 352m at this track in a handy (19.60), beating Glen's Wish. Recorded the quickest time on the card last time. Can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 3.5 lengths over 352m at this track in a handy (19.60), beating Glen's Wish. Recorded the quickest time on the card last time. Can measure up again.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by a nose at this track over 352m (19.98) beating Sunset Dreaming in Grade 4 on April 1. Has clocked an outstanding 19.56 Best Time here at the trip. Winning chance with a similar performance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on the first turn; Checked and gave ground entering the home turn.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Q Straight (16.64) in a Mix 5, finishing a neck second. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Looks a leading chance.
